name: List Articles
description: Deliberately unauthenticated (no `auth.jwt` middleware, must not 401 anonymously). Noda has no in-workflow JWT decode/verify node (only `util.jwt_sign` exists), so the caller's identity cannot be recovered here without the hard-401'ing `auth.jwt` middleware; the viewer id passed to the `favorited`/`following` subqueries is therefore always the literal empty string, making both always false. Documented gap, same pattern as get-article/get-profile (see task-3/task-4 reports, noda-limitation). Per-row author profile is resolved via a JOIN to auth_users rather than a companion query + transform.map merge: `GROUP BY a.id, u.id` is valid Postgres SQL because both are primary keys, so every other column of `a`/`u` is functionally dependent and can be selected outside the GROUP BY list — this keeps the whole list+filters+author lookup in a single indexed query instead of one round-trip per row.

config.query: SELECT a.slug, a.title, a.description, a.body, a.created_at, a.updated_at, a.author_id, to_json(COALESCE(array_agg(DISTINCT at.tag) FILTER (WHERE at.tag IS NOT NULL), '{}')) AS tag_list, (SELECT count(*) FROM favorites f WHERE f.article_id = a.id) AS favorites_count, EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM favorites f WHERE f.article_id = a.id AND f.user_id = $4) AS favorited, u.metadata->>'username' AS username, u.metadata->>'bio' AS bio, u.metadata->>'image' AS image, EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM follows fo WHERE fo.follower_id = $4 AND fo.followee_id = a.author_id) AS following FROM articles a LEFT JOIN article_tags at ON at.article_id = a.id JOIN auth_users u ON u.id = a.author_id WHERE ($1 = '' OR EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM article_tags t2 WHERE t2.article_id = a.id AND t2.tag = $1)) AND ($2 = '' OR a.author_id = (SELECT id FROM auth_users WHERE metadata->>'username' = $2)) AND ($3 = '' OR EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM favorites f2 JOIN auth_users u2 ON u2.id = f2.user_id WHERE f2.article_id = a.id AND u2.metadata->>'username' = $3)) GROUP BY a.id, u.id ORDER BY a.created_at DESC LIMIT $5 OFFSET $6

SELECT count(*) AS count FROM articles a WHERE ($1 = '' OR EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM article_tags t2 WHERE t2.article_id = a.id AND t2.tag = $1)) AND ($2 = '' OR a.author_id = (SELECT id FROM auth_users WHERE metadata->>'username' = $2)) AND ($3 = '' OR EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM favorites f2 JOIN auth_users u2 ON u2.id = f2.user_id WHERE f2.article_id = a.id AND u2.metadata->>'username' = $3))
